name: windows-appshot
description: Capture foreground Windows app context for Codex CLI as a screenshot and UI Automation text bundle.

interface.shortDescription: Capture Windows app context for Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Windows Appshot is a Codex plugin for Windows users who want to bring app context into Codex CLI. Invoke $windows-appshot to capture a foreground app, specific window, or browser tab as a local screenshot plus available UI Automation text bundle.
defaultPrompt: Capture Edge Gmail tab with Windows Appshot.
